# Expat Savvy Switzerland

> Independent insurance advisory for expats in Switzerland. Health insurance (KVG/VVG), 3rd pillar tax optimization, and comprehensive financial planning. Free consultations. FINMA-certified advisors.

## Core Services
- Health Insurance Advisory: KVG mandatory insurance, VVG supplementary, provider comparison
- 3rd Pillar Optimization: 3a/3b tax savings, provider comparison (VIAC, Frankly, finpension)
- Life Insurance: Risk coverage and savings products
- Household & Liability Insurance: Personal liability, household contents, legal protection
- Pension Planning: Swiss 3-pillar system navigation for expats

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://expat-savvy.ch/
- Health Insurance: https://expat-savvy.ch/health-insurance/
- 3rd Pillar Guide: https://expat-savvy.ch/3rd-pillar/
- Insurance Guides: https://expat-savvy.ch/guides/how-to/
- Blog: https://expat-savvy.ch/blog/
- About: https://expat-savvy.ch/about/
- Free Consultation: https://expat-savvy.ch/free-consultation/
- Compare Providers: https://expat-savvy.ch/compare-providers/

## Insurance Comparison Tools
- Health Insurance by City: Zurich, Geneva, Basel, Bern, Zug, Lausanne, Lugano
- Provider Comparisons: CSS vs Sanitas, Helsana vs CSS, SWICA vs Helsana, SWICA vs CSS
- 3rd Pillar Providers: VIAC vs Frankly vs finpension, Bank vs Insurance
